bupt.ta.service

类 StudentNotificationService

  • java.lang.Object
    • bupt.ta.service.StudentNotificationService

  • public class StudentNotificationService
extends java.lang.Object
    Creates in-app notifications for TA applicants when application state changes. Comments describe intent for each SiteNotification.getKind() value.

    • 字段概要

      字段 
      限定符和类型 字段和说明
      static java.lang.String KIND_APPLICATION_SUBMITTED
      SiteNotification.getKind() for a new submission.
      static java.lang.String KIND_AUTO_CLOSED
      Application auto-closed due to workload cap.
      static java.lang.String KIND_AUTO_PROMOTED
      Promoted from waitlist to selected.
      static java.lang.String KIND_INTERVIEW_DETAILS
      Interview time/location details sent.
      static java.lang.String KIND_STATUS_INTERVIEW
      Applicant moved to interview stage.
      static java.lang.String KIND_STATUS_REJECTED
      Applicant not selected.
      static java.lang.String KIND_STATUS_SELECTED
      Applicant selected for the role.
      static java.lang.String KIND_STATUS_WAITLIST
      Applicant placed on waitlist.
      static java.lang.String KIND_WITHDRAWN
      Applicant withdrew.

    • 构造器概要

      构造器 
      构造器和说明
      StudentNotificationService() 

    • 方法概要

      所有方法 静态方法 具体方法 
      限定符和类型 方法和说明
      static void notifyApplicationSubmitted(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job)
      Notifies the applicant that an application was submitted.
      static void notifyAutoClosed(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job, java.lang.String note)
      Notifies the applicant that a pending application was auto-closed (workload cap).
      static void notifyAutoPromotedFromWaitlist(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job)
      Notifies the applicant that they were promoted from the waitlist to selected.
      static void notifyInterviewDetails(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job)
      Notifies the applicant of interview time, location, and assessment notes.
      static void notifyInterviewInvite(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job)
      Notifies the applicant that their application moved to the interview stage.
      static void notifyRejected(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job, java.lang.String moNotes)
      Notifies the applicant that they were not selected.
      static void notifySelected(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job)
      Notifies the applicant that they were selected for the role.
      static void notifyWaitlist(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job)
      Notifies the applicant that they are on the waitlist.
      static void notifyWithdrawn(DataStorage storage, Application app, Job job)
      Notifies the applicant that they withdrew an application.

      • 从类继承的方法 java.lang.Object

        clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

    • 构造器详细资料

      • StudentNotificationService

        public StudentNotificationService()

    • 方法详细资料

      • notifyApplicationSubmitted

        public static void notifyApplicationSubmitted(DataStorage storage,
                                              Application app,
                                              Job job)
                                       throws java.io.IOException
        Notifies the applicant that an application was submitted.
        参数:
        storage - persistence
        app - application record
        job - job posting (may be null)
        抛出:
        java.io.IOException - if notification persistence fails

      • notifyInterviewInvite

        public static void notifyInterviewInvite(DataStorage storage,
                                         Application app,
                                         Job job)
                                  throws java.io.IOException
        Notifies the applicant that their application moved to the interview stage.
        参数:
        storage - persistence
        app - application record
        job - job posting (may be null)
        抛出:
        java.io.IOException - if notification persistence fails

      • notifyWaitlist

        public static void notifyWaitlist(DataStorage storage,
                                  Application app,
                                  Job job)
                           throws java.io.IOException
        Notifies the applicant that they are on the waitlist.
        参数:
        storage - persistence
        app - application record
        job - job posting (may be null)
        抛出:
        java.io.IOException - if notification persistence fails

      • notifySelected

        public static void notifySelected(DataStorage storage,
                                  Application app,
                                  Job job)
                           throws java.io.IOException
        Notifies the applicant that they were selected for the role.
        参数:
        storage - persistence
        app - application record
        job - job posting (may be null)
        抛出:
        java.io.IOException - if notification persistence fails

      • notifyRejected

        public static void notifyRejected(DataStorage storage,
                                  Application app,
                                  Job job,
                                  java.lang.String moNotes)
                           throws java.io.IOException
        Notifies the applicant that they were not selected.
        参数:
        storage - persistence
        app - application record
        job - job posting (may be null)
        moNotes - optional organiser message included in the body
        抛出:
        java.io.IOException - if notification persistence fails

      • notifyInterviewDetails

        public static void notifyInterviewDetails(DataStorage storage,
                                          Application app,
                                          Job job)
                                   throws java.io.IOException
        Notifies the applicant of interview time, location, and assessment notes.
        参数:
        storage - persistence
        app - application record (carries interview fields)
        job - job posting (may be null)
        抛出:
        java.io.IOException - if notification persistence fails

      • notifyAutoClosed

        public static void notifyAutoClosed(DataStorage storage,
                                    Application app,
                                    Job job,
                                    java.lang.String note)
                             throws java.io.IOException
        Notifies the applicant that a pending application was auto-closed (workload cap).
        参数:
        storage - persistence
        app - application record
        job - job posting (may be null)
        note - optional system note appended to the body
        抛出:
        java.io.IOException - if notification persistence fails

      • notifyWithdrawn

        public static void notifyWithdrawn(DataStorage storage,
                                   Application app,
                                   Job job)
                            throws java.io.IOException
        Notifies the applicant that they withdrew an application.
        参数:
        storage - persistence
        app - application record
        job - job posting (may be null)
        抛出:
        java.io.IOException - if notification persistence fails

      • notifyAutoPromotedFromWaitlist

        public static void notifyAutoPromotedFromWaitlist(DataStorage storage,
                                                  Application app,
                                                  Job job)
                                           throws java.io.IOException
        Notifies the applicant that they were promoted from the waitlist to selected.
        参数:
        storage - persistence
        app - application record
        job - job posting (may be null)
        抛出:
        java.io.IOException - if notification persistence fails
